news:news.news:title: Lebanon and Israel officials are set to meet in the US amid ongoing tensions, while US-Iran peace talks are scheduled to begin in Pakistan.
news:news.news:keywords: Middle East peace talks, Lebanon Israel relations, US Iran negotiations, violence in the West Bank, Taiwan China relations

news:news.news:title: US inflation rises sharply amid economic uncertainty due to the ongoing war with Iran, impacting various sectors including oil and banking.
news:news.news:keywords: US inflation trends, impact of Iran war on economy, corporate responses to social issues

news:news.news:title: The FAA is looking to gamers to help address air traffic controller shortages, while Amazon Luna restricts third-party game purchases.
news:news.news:keywords: FAA air traffic controller shortage solutions, OpenAI CEO incident, Amazon Luna game purchase restrictions, Windows 11 experimental features, AI-generated content virality

news:news.news:title: Rory McIlroy sets a Masters record with a six-shot lead, while notable player transactions and injuries impact various sports leagues.
news:news.news:keywords: Rory McIlroy Masters performance, NFL player trades and contracts, WNBA player signings, NBA playoff predictions, MLB injury updates

news:news.news:title: Recent scientific advancements include a potential cancer treatment nutrient, a new stool test for colorectal cancer, and insights into Alzheimer's and dark matter.
news:news.news:keywords: cancer treatment advancements, new colorectal cancer detection methods, Alzheimer's disease research updates, dark matter theories, superconductivity discoveries

news:news.news:title: Tensions in the Middle East continue as ceasefire discussions unfold, while global political dynamics shift with new regulations and international incidents.
news:news.news:keywords: Middle East ceasefire discussions, US-Iran relations, India social media regulations, NATO criticisms, impact of journalist killings

news:news.news:title: The ongoing Iran conflict is significantly impacting global oil prices and economic forecasts, with potential long-term effects on the economy.
news:news.news:keywords: impact of Iran war on global economy, oil prices and market volatility, job market challenges in Washington DC

news:news.news:title: OpenAI introduces a new $100 per month Pro subscription for ChatGPT, while Florida investigates the company over potential national security risks.
news:news.news:keywords: OpenAI subscription news, Florida investigation into AI, latest smartwatch deals, Instagram comment editing feature, Netflix gaming updates

news:news.news:title: Rory McIlroy co-leads the Masters after a strong opening round, while NBA star Joel Embiid undergoes surgery for appendicitis.
news:news.news:keywords: Masters Tournament 2026 updates, NBA injury news, WNBA player contracts, NCAA basketball player decisions, FIFA World Cup ticket prices

news:news.news:title: Recent scientific discoveries reveal significant insights into health, genetics, and human history, including new anti-inflammatory compounds and the role of gut bacteria in neurodegenerative diseases.
news:news.news:keywords: anti-inflammatory plant compounds, gut bacteria and neurodegenerative diseases, genetic code and gene silencing, human migration to Australia, brain waste removal pathways

news:news.news:title: US Inflation Soars Amid Middle East Turmoil as Cloudflare Unveils AI-Driven EmDash System
Oil Prices Spike as Iran Conflict Escalates and OpenAI Faces Florida's National Security Probe
